LanguageData.VVE_Acceleration_High.description:
With swift acceleration, we move forward in leaps, seizing the day with passion.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - All vehicles have World Speed Multiplier: x1.25
LanguageData.VVE_Acceleration_High.label: high
LanguageData.VVE_Acceleration_Standard.description: Our vehicles move with balance, neither too fast nor too slow.
LanguageData.VVE_Acceleration_Standard.label: standard
LanguageData.VVE_Acceleration_SundayDriver.descriptio:
A measured pace keeps the world in balance and grants us time to savor the journey.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - All vehicles have World Speed Multiplier: x0.8
LanguageData.VVE_Acceleration_SundayDriver.label: sunday driver
